claims.calculation: ETF 8- and 10-sleeve economic sizing passes at USD 1,000 and USD 2,000; the 12-sleeve case breaches the 25% weight cap because the locked 3% volatility for SGOV creates a 29.67% target weight.
claims.caveat: This is deterministic E0 feasibility evidence, not evidence of trend-following returns, edge, broker approval, or deployment readiness.
claims.fact: Public broker terms establish general fractional availability and published fees, but not a fully verified exact Thailand implementation path.
claims.inference: Fractional ETFs are the only economically plausible current-capital branch, while micro futures require capital far above USD 2,000.
claims.locked_assumption: Capital, breadth, inverse-volatility inputs, cash, concentration, turnover, spread, margin, and stress gates are copied from the locked preregistration.
claims.recommendation: Carry a scope restriction into B3 and verify exact Webull Thailand ticker/minimum/FX and OpenAPI fractional capability before any implementation study.

limitations: Thailand is absent from the public IBKR margin wizard.
Maintenance margins and expiry-specific first-notice or last-trade dates were not captured.
Round-turn total cost excludes exchange and regulatory fees.
ZN and ZT are imperfect full-size proxy comparators for Micro Yield contracts.

source_inventory.claim_supported: US stock and ETF commission is 0.10% of trade value with no minimum, excluding 7% VAT; sell-side regulatory fees also apply.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Public Thailand schedule; funding FX cost is not established.

source_inventory.claim_supported: Fractional trading is mobile-app only, regular-hours, market-order only, and limited to securities marked with a green diamond; quantity supports four decimals.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Does not verify the 12 candidate tickers, a minimum order, or OpenAPI support.
source_inventory.url: https://www.webull.co.th/help/faq/355-ฉันสามารถซื้อขายแบบเศษหุ้นได้หรือไม่

source_inventory.claim_supported: Thailand OpenAPI advertises US stock and ETF access.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Does not establish fractional-order support; other services are described as in development.

source_inventory.claim_supported: Global developer documentation describes fractional trading.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Not evidence of Webull Thailand capability under the locked regional rule.
Trading permissions and funding methods remain account-specific.

source_inventory.claim_supported: IBKR advertises fractional trading in more than 10,500 eligible US stocks and ETFs from USD 1.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Exact candidate-ticker eligibility and Thailand-account permission were not queried.

source_inventory.claim_supported: IBKR Pro US stock schedules show tiered USD 0.0035/share with USD 0.35 minimum or fixed USD 0.005/share with USD 1 minimum; Lite is limited to US residents.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Annual cost depends on order count, which was not locked before measurement.

source_inventory.claim_supported: IBKR publishes API options for individual clients.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: No Thailand-account permission or entitlement was queried.

source_inventory.claim_supported: Low-volume US futures broker commission is USD 0.85 per contract per side before exchange and regulatory fees.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: USD 1.70 round-turn is a broker-commission floor, not total execution cost.

source_inventory.claim_supported: Public overnight initial-margin snapshot used for the contract roots in this study.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Hong Kong-resident schedule used because Thailand was absent from the public wizard; actual Thai-account margin is an operational blocker.

source_inventory.claim_supported: Public daily chart endpoints supplied the 2026-07-14 reference prices for the 12 exposure roots.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Indicative public reference prices, not executable quotes; the ES endpoint is the recorded example and the same endpoint pattern was used for other roots.

source_inventory.claim_supported: Issuer product pages/factsheets identify ticker, economic sleeve, US listing, USD trading currency, inception, and expense ratio for the candidate set.
source_inventory.publisher: Vanguard, iShares, Schwab, State Street, Invesco, and iM Global Partner
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: VTI is the recorded example URL; facts are research identifiers, not a recommendation, and exact broker fractional eligibility remains unverified.

source_inventory.claim_supported: Official product specifications support the contract multipliers or risk units used for CME exposure roots.
source_inventory.staleness_or_scope_note: Automated page access was limited; ZN/ZT are imperfect full-size proxies for Micro Yield 10Y/2Y contracts and expiry-specific rules were not captured.
